title: Last call: QGIS User Conference 2026 call for papers
content:
Last call! The QGIS UC2026 Call for Papers closes April 12 at 23:59 (Europe/Zurich). We're looking for talks, workshops, and mini-workshops – all levels welcome, from end users to developers, academia to industry.

Don't miss your chance to present at Laax this October, submit now!

Double click here for more information
